name: Penguins
teaser: Play random extra minions directly out of your deck and trigger abilities each time you play a minion that way.
mechanics: Play random extra minions directly out of your deck and trigger abilities each time you play a minion that way.
description:
The Penguins were to be the single faction in the cancelled World Tour Event Kit. They are now available in the Smash Up Penguins set.

This faction has no official flavor text because the World Tour Event Kit would not have a rulebook.

They focus on playing random extra minions straight out of the deck and gaining benefits from doing so.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
The Penguins have the usual 10 minions and 10 actions. They are also one of the rare factions to have a titan. The total minion base power (not counting any abilities) is unusually low at only 27 or an average of 2.7 per minion compared to the usual 30 and 3.

Among their actions, there are:
* 0 play-on-minion actions,
* 3 play-on-base actions: Ice Slide, Leaping Aboard, Pebble Gift,
* 7 standard actions (3 that affect one or more minions, in bold): A Wish for Wings That Work (2x), I Can’t Tell Them Apart, Secret Mission, The Hatching (2x), Under the Ice,
* 2 actions that directly increase a minion's power: A Wish for Wings That Work (2x).
actionList:
2x A Wish for Wings That Work - Choose a base. Play Emperor Penguin there OR all of your minions there gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
1x I Can’t Tell Them Apart - Shuffle any number of your minions on a base into your deck. Play an equal number of minions there off the top of your deck as extra minions.
1x Ice Slide - Play on a base. Special: After this base scores, draw one card for each of your minions that goes to the discard pile from here.
1x Leaping Aboard - Play on a base. Special: After this base scores, play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion on the base that replaces it.
1x Pebble Gift - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here off the top of a deck, draw a card.
1x Secret Mission - Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck. Draw that many cards, then shuffle your deck.
2x The Hatching - Play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion.
1x Under the Ice - Reveal the top five cards of your deck. Play a random minion of them as an extra minion. Place the rest on the bottom of their owner’s deck in any order.
actions:
2x A Wish for Wings That Work - Choose a base. Play Emperor Penguin there OR all of your minions there gain +1 power until the end of the turn.

1x I Can’t Tell Them Apart - Shuffle any number of your minions on a base into your deck. Play an equal number of minions there off the top of your deck as extra minions.

1x Ice Slide - Play on a base. Special: After this base scores, draw one card for each of your minions that goes to the discard pile from here.

1x Leaping Aboard - Play on a base. Special: After this base scores, play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion on the base that replaces it.

1x Pebble Gift - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play a minion here off the top of a deck, draw a card.

1x Secret Mission - Place any number of cards from your hand on the bottom of your deck. Draw that many cards, then shuffle your deck.

2x The Hatching - Play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion.

1x Under the Ice - Reveal the top five cards of your deck. Play a random minion of them as an extra minion. Place the rest on the bottom of their owner’s deck in any order.
characters:
1x Command Penguin - power 4 - Play a minion off the top of your deck as an extra minion.

1x Dancing Penguin - power 4 - Special: When you play another minion, you may play this minion to the same base instead. Place the other minion on the bottom of its owner’s deck; it has no effect.

1x Disguise Penguin - power 3 - Talent: Place this minion on the bottom of your deck to play a minion off the top of your deck here as an extra minion. The Disguise Penguin ability can only be used once per turn.

1x Snazzy Penguin - power 3 - If this minion was played off the top of a deck, draw two cards.

1x Surfing Penguin - power 3 - You may move a minion from here to another base.

1x Regurgitating Penguin - power 2 - Reveal the top three cards of your deck. You may place an action revealed into your hand. Return the rest in any order.

4x Baby Penguin - power 2 - If this minion was played off the top of a deck, you may play an extra minion here of power 3 or less.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the World Tour Event Kit insert:

Dancing Penguin: You must reveal the minion you are about to play, and show it is a legal play at a particular base, before playing Dancing Penguin instead. If replaced, the other minion does not count as being played, so abilities that depend on it being played don’t trigger. Dancing Penguin is not limited by constraints on the minion it replaces, and it is not affected by the ability that plays the other minion (e.g. neither part of “Play an extra minion of power 2 or less and place a +1 power counter on it” would apply).

Disguise Penguin: If this cards ends up replaying itself, you cannot re-use its ability the same turn.

Surfing Penguin: The minion moved may belong to you or to another player, and can be Surfing Penguin itself.

Under the Ice: If you reveal no minion, you play nothing and just place the cards on the bottom of your deck.
effects:
Penguins make use of the new "Play off the top of the deck" to play a lot of extra minions, although with very little control over which minion you'll get.

To play a minion off the top of the deck, you reveal cards from the top of your deck until you find a minion, which you'll play. Revealed actions (if any) get shuffled into your deck after that. More details here.

Penguins have very little way to set up the top of your deck to control which minion you'll get, and most of their abilities can end with you shuffling your deck, therefore undoing any setup you may have done. ("Play off the top of a deck" abilities only end with you shuffling your deck if you revealed any actions.)

A few of their abilities (Baby Penguins, Snazzy Penguin and Pebble Gift) give you benefits for playing a minion off the top of the deck, but please note that for a minion to be considered as "played off the top of a deck", it does not have to be played with a "Play off the top of a deck" ability. If an ability or rule makes you reveal one or more cards from the top of a deck and have you play a minion from among those cards, then the played minion is considered as having been played off the top of that deck. So cards, such as Hoverbot, Moon Dumpster, or even the Penguins' very own Under the Ice card all trigger Baby Penguins, Snazzy Penguin and Pebble Gift. More details here.

name: Goblins
teaser: Flip coins to determine what benefits you can get, such as power or card draws, and manipulate the outcome of your coin flips.
mechanics: Flip coins to determine what benefits you can get, such as power or card draws, and manipulate the outcome of your coin flips.
description:
The Goblins are the single faction in the Smash Up Goblins set.

This faction has no official flavor text because the Smash Up Goblins has no rulebook. However, the following flavor text can be found on AEG's online store:

They rely on abilities that are entirely determined by the result of a coin flip.

Their complexity rating is: Medium-High.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
The Goblins have the usual 10 minions and 10 actions. The total minion base power (not counting any abilities) is the usual 30 or an average of 3 per minion.

Among their actions, there are:
* 1 play-on-minion action: “Magic” Helmet,
* 1 play-on-base action: Goblin Recruiters,
* 8 standard actions (4 that affect one or more minions, in bold): A Little Help (2x), Bushwhacking, Demolition, He Who Smelt It, Make Your Own Luck (2x), Revving Up
* 4 actions that directly increase a minion's power: “Magic” Helmet, Demolition, He Who Smelt It, Revving Up.
actionList:
1x “Magic” Helmet - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has +4 power. Before this base scores, flip a coin. If tails, destroy this minion.
2x A Little Help - Flip a coin. If heads, you may play an extra minion. If tails, you may play two extra actions.
1x Bushwhacking - Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, destroy the minion. If tails, move it to another base.
1x Demolition - Flip three coins. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. For each tails, you may destroy an action on a base or on a minion.
1x Goblin Recruiters - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you flip a coin, if it was heads, draw a card; if tails, you may shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.
1x He Who Smelt It - Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion and you may choose another minion and flip again. If tails, you may play an extra action.
2x Make Your Own Luck - Special: Play immediately after you flip a coin. Change its result.
1x Revving Up - Choose a base. Flip a coin for each of your minions there. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion. For each tails, that minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
actions:
1x “Magic” Helmet - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has +4 power. Before this base scores, flip a coin. If tails, destroy this minion.

2x A Little Help - Flip a coin. If heads, you may play an extra minion. If tails, you may play two extra actions.

1x Bushwhacking - Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, destroy the minion. If tails, move it to another base.

1x Demolition - Flip three coins. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. For each tails, you may destroy an action on a base or on a minion.

1x Goblin Recruiters - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you flip a coin, if it was heads, draw a card; if tails, you may shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.

1x He Who Smelt It - Choose a minion and flip a coin. If heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion and you may choose another minion and flip again. If tails, you may play an extra action.

2x Make Your Own Luck - Special: Play immediately after you flip a coin. Change its result.

1x Revving Up - Choose a base. Flip a coin for each of your minions there. For each heads, place a +1 power counter on that minion. For each tails, that minion gains +2 power until the end of the turn.
characters:
1x Chaos Lord - power 5 - Ongoing: After you flip a coin, if it was heads, place a +1 power counter on one of your minions; if tails, draw a card then discard a card.

2x Diviner - power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, immediately after you flip a coin you may discard a card to change its result. After the first time each turn you flip a coin, draw a card.

3x Blaster - power 3 - Special: Before this base scores, flip a coin. If heads, you may give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn. If tails, you may move this minion to another base.

4x Gobbo - power 2 - Flip a coin for each Gobbo in play (including this one). For each heads, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
clarifications: There are no official clarifications for this faction as no insert was made for Smash Up Goblins.
effects:
Goblins have a lot of cards that have you play heads or tails in order to determine their outcome, making this a seemingly very random faction to play with. Overall, both heads and tails results can be desirable. Heads tend to give you the better outcomes, most often +1 power counters. On the other hand, tails give you good or bad outcomes depending on the card--bad most often being the card doing nothing at all.

To mitigate that randomness, Goblins provide you with Diviners and Make Your Own Luck, a total of four cards you can use to change the result of a coin you're flipping if you don't get what you want.

Finally, Chaos Lord and Goblin Recruiters are two cards that trigger on you flipping coins, giving you additional effects on both heads and tails results, making good outcomes even better or balancing a bad outcome.

name: Knights of the Round Table
expansion: Smash Up Knights of the Round Table
teaser: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a team of seven strong minions, move them around, and have them end their movement on a base with your play-on-base actions to trigger various benefits.
mechanics: Play with a reduced number of minions in your deck, but with a team of seven strong minions, move them around, and have them end their movement on a base with your play-on-base actions to trigger various benefits.
description:
The Knights of the Round Table are the single faction in the Smash Up Knights of the Round Table set.

This faction has no official flavor text because the Smash Up Knights of the Round Table has no rulebook. However, the following flavor text can be found on Forgefire's online store:

They ride all over the bases, completing quests to get various prizes.

Their complexity rating is: Medium.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
The Knights of the Round Table have only 7 minions and 13 actions compared to the usual 10 and 10. Nearly each minion is power 4, with only one at power 5, which makes the total minion base power (not counting any abilities) equal to 29 or an average of 4.14 per minion compared to the usual 30 and 3. On top of that, they have several abilities that can boost the power of minions beyond their base value.

Among their actions, there are:

* 4 play-on-minion actions: A Questing, Excalibur, Noble Steed (2x),
* 7 play-on-base actions: Good Deed (2x), Merlin’s Library, The Fisher King, The Grail, The Green Knight, The Questing Beast,
* 2 standard actions (none of them affect minions): The Lady of the Lake, The Mists of Avalon,
* 1 actions that directly increase a minion's power: Excalibur.
actionList:
1x A Questing - Play on one of your minions. You may move it. Ongoing: When this minion would go to the discard pile, place it on top of your deck instead.
1x Excalibur - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power and cannot be destroyed by other players' cards. Special: When this base scores, if this minion is King Arthur, gain 1 VP.
2x Good Deed - Play on a base. Draw a card. Ongoing: After one of your minions moves to here, you may transfer this card to another base and draw a card. The Good Deed Ongoing ability can only be used once per turn.
1x Merlin’s Library - Play on a base. Talent: Play an extra minion here OR move one of your minions to here OR transfer this action to another base.
2x Noble Steed - Play on one of your minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base.
1x The Fisher King - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, draw a card. Then if you have eight or more cards in your hand, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.
1x The Grail - Play on a base with none of your actions on it. Ongoing: After one of your minions moves to here, if you have three or more minions of power 4 or more here, place this card in the box to gain 2 VP.
1x The Green Knight - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, place a +1 power counter on one of them. Then if that minion has power 7 or more, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.
1x The Lady of the Lake - Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that can be played on a minion. Draw it or play it as an extra action.
1x The Mists of Avalon - Shuffle up to three minions from your discard pile into your deck.
1x The Questing Beast - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, place a +1 power counter on one of them and transfer this card to another base .
actions:
1x A Questing - Play on one of your minions. You may move it. Ongoing: When this minion would go to the discard pile, place it on top of your deck instead.

1x Excalibur - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power and cannot be destroyed by other players' cards. Special: When this base scores, if this minion is King Arthur, gain 1 VP.

2x Good Deed - Play on a base. Draw a card. Ongoing: After one of your minions moves to here, you may transfer this card to another base and draw a card. The Good Deed Ongoing ability can only be used once per turn.

1x Merlin’s Library - Play on a base. Talent: Play an extra minion here OR move one of your minions to here OR transfer this action to another base.

2x Noble Steed - Play on one of your minions. Talent: Move this minion to another base.

1x The Fisher King - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, draw a card. Then if you have eight or more cards in your hand, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.

1x The Grail - Play on a base with none of your actions on it. Ongoing: After one of your minions moves to here, if you have three or more minions of power 4 or more here, place this card in the box to gain 2 VP.

1x The Green Knight - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, place a +1 power counter on one of them. Then if that minion has power 7 or more, destroy this card to gain 1 VP.

1x The Lady of the Lake - Search your deck and/or discard pile for an action that can be played on a minion. Draw it or play it as an extra action.

1x The Mists of Avalon - Shuffle up to three minions from your discard pile into your deck.

1x The Questing Beast - Play on a base. Ongoing: After one or more of your minions move to here, place a +1 power counter on one of them and transfer this card to another base .
characters:
1x King Arthur - power 5 - Talent: Move one of your minions from another base to here. If you do, place a +1 power counter on it if you have an action on this base.

1x Galahad - power 4 - Search your deck for an action that can be played on a base and place it on top of your deck. Special: Before this base scores, you may transfer one of your actions on it to another base.

1x Gawain - power 4 - Ongoing: This minion has +1 power for each of your other minions of power 4 or more here.

1x Guinevere - power 4 - Talent: Move another of your minions from here to another base. Ongoing: Your actions on bases cannot be destroyed by other players’ abilities.

1x Lancelot - power 4 - Ongoing: After this minion moves to a base with one or more of your actions on it, place a +1 power counter on this minion.

1x Merlin - power 4 - Talent: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it is an action, draw it or play it as an extra action, otherwise return it.

1x Percival - power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base with one or more of your actions on it.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Smash Up Knights of the Round Table insert:

(Add the official clarifications about this faction, if there are any)
effects: The Knights of the Round Table have an unusual cast of minions, having only seven unique minions, each with a power of 4 and one with a power of 5. They revolve around actions on bases, representing quests, and moving your minions around, especially to to bases with your actions on it in order to gain various benefits, such as +1 power counters, card draws and extra VPs.

name: Teens
teaser: Gain benefits for playing minions of printed power 3 and for playing minions with specific names on the same base.
mechanics: Gain benefits for playing minions of printed power 3 and for playing minions with specific names on the same base.
description:
The Teens are the single faction in the Smash Up Teens set.

This faction has no official flavor text because the Smash Up Teens has no rulebook. However, the following flavor text can be found on AEG's online store:

They focus on power-3 minions interacting with each other and effects that revolve around playing minions of exactly 3 power.

Their complexity rating is: Medium-High.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
The Teens have the usual 10 minions and 10 actions. The total minion base power (not counting any abilities) is the usual 30 or an average of 3 per minion.

Among their actions, there are:
* 3 play-on-minion actions: Abe Froman (2x), Babysitter,
* 1 play-on-base action: Booty Trap,
* 9 standard actions (2 that affects one or more minions, in bold): Brunch Bunch, Explosion at School, New Kid (2x), Principal’s Office, Strange Science,
* 0 actions that directly increase a minion's power.
actionList:
2x Abe Froman - Play on one of your minions. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, this minion also has the same name as every other minion you own. Using this minion’s abilities does not count as using another minion's abilities.
1x Babysitter - Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be affected by other players’ abilities.
1x Booty Trap - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move a minion with printed power 3 to this base, draw a card.
1x Brunch Bunch - Choose a base. For each name on a minion of yours there with printed power 3, you may choose a different effect:• Move one of your minions to there.• Draw a card.• Play an extra minion of power 3 there.• Give a minion there +2 power until the end of the turn.• Place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
1x Explosion at School - Shuffle any number of minions of power 3 with different names from your discard pile into your deck and draw a card.
2x New Kid - Search your deck for a minion of power 3 and play it as an extra minion.
1x Principal’s Office - Return one of your minions to your hand. You may play a minion of printed power 3 as an extra minion.
1x Strange Science - Play a minion of power 3 from your discard pile as an extra minion.
actions:
2x Abe Froman - Play on one of your minions. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, this minion also has the same name as every other minion you own. Using this minion’s abilities does not count as using another minion's abilities.

1x Babysitter - Play on one of your minions. Ongoing: Your minions here cannot be affected by other players’ abilities.

1x Booty Trap - Play on a base. Ongoing: After you play or move a minion with printed power 3 to this base, draw a card.

1x Brunch Bunch - Choose a base. For each name on a minion of yours there with printed power 3, you may choose a different effect:• Move one of your minions to there.• Draw a card.• Play an extra minion of power 3 there.• Give a minion there +2 power until the end of the turn.• Place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

1x Explosion at School - Shuffle any number of minions of power 3 with different names from your discard pile into your deck and draw a card.

2x New Kid - Search your deck for a minion of power 3 and play it as an extra minion.

1x Principal’s Office - Return one of your minions to your hand. You may play a minion of printed power 3 as an extra minion.

1x Strange Science - Play a minion of power 3 from your discard pile as an extra minion.

[FACTION ICON]
characters:
2x Brain - power 3 - If there is a Slacker here, you may play an extra action. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may draw a card.

2x Jock - power 3 - If there is a Prep here, place two +1 power counters on this minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion.

2x Prep - power 3 - If there is a Brain here, you may search your deck for a minion of power 3 and draw it. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may give one of your minions +2 power until the end of the turn.

2x Rebel - power 3 - If there is a Jock here, you may play an extra non-Rebel minion of power 3 here. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may move one of your minions to another base.

2x Slacker - power 3 - If there is a Rebel here, move up to two of your minions to other bases. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play another minion of power 3, you may place a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.
bases:
* Cabin in the Woods
* Montridge High
clarifications: There are no official clarifications for this faction as no insert was made for Smash Up Teens.
synergy:
* Aliens: Prep and New Kid make it easy to fetch Invader. Brain, Jock, Prep, Rebel, Slacker, and Booty Trap all trigger off your Invader plays. Principal's Office adds to the suite of minion-bouncing and extra play effects. If an Invader ends up in discard, Explosion at School can shuffle it into your deck, and Strange Science lets you play it right out of your discard.
* Ninjas: Shinobi are deceptively powerful with Teens thanks to the sheer number of power 3 support cards. Prep can give the Shinobi +2 power after you play it, further increasing the amount by which it can swing a base, Brain and Booty Trap can draw you cards for playing Shinobi, and Slacker can put Shinobi back into your deck from your discard pile.
* Grimms’ Fairy Tales: Abe Froman and Grimms' Blessing enable the names-matter effects in both factions. The power 3 fetching can help you find Frog Prince, Red Riding Hood, and Rumpelstiltzkin.
* Big Hero 6: The characters (minions) are all power 3, making them work perfectly with Teens' triggers and support.

name: Slashers
teaser: Use the five strong Slashers with their own weapons to massacre low-power minions.
mechanics: Use the five strong Slashers with their own weapons to massacre low-power minions.
description:
The Slashers are the single faction in the Smash Up Slashers set.

Destruction, power counters, recursion. Each Slasher can summon its weapon for a unique mechanic. Destroy enemy minions and boost your own.

Their complexity rating is: Medium.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
[IMAGE OF ALL THE CARDS]

(Add info on the number of minions and actions, and the total minion base power)

Among their actions, there are:
* 6 play-on-minion actions: Austin Kirk Mask, Chainsaw, Clawed Glove, Hide in the Laundry, Machete, Puzzle Box,
* 0 play-on-base actions,
* 9 standard actions (3 that affects one or more minions, in bold): Brutal Attack, Ch-Ch-Ch Ha-Ha-Ha, He Was A Good Boy!, Improvised Weapon, Oh Noooooo!, Origin Story (2x), The End? (2x),
* 2 actions that directly increase a minion's power: Brutal Attack, Oh Noooooo!.
actionList:
1x Austin Kirk Mask - Play on your minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, give this minion the amount of power of one of those minions until the end of the turn.
1x Brutal Attack - Destroy a minion with printed power 3 or less at a base with one of your minions, then you may give a Slasher there +3 power until the end of the turn.
1x Ch-Ch-Ch Ha-Ha-Ha - Move one of your minions. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile OR play an extra action.
1x Chainsaw - Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place a +1 power counter on this minion. After a minion is destroyed, you may move this minion to or from its base.
1x Clawed Glove - Play on your minion. Talent: Give a minion here -1 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
1x He Was A Good Boy! - Place a minion from the discard pile into your hand and play an extra action.
1x Hide in the Laundry - Play on another player’s minion. Play an extra action. Ongoing: After a Slasher is played or moved to here, you may destroy this minion unless its controller discards a card and moves this minion to a base without a Slasher.
1x Improvised Weapon - Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. You may play it as an extra action; destroy it at the end of the turn.
1x Machete - Play on your minion. Talent: Move this minion to a base with another player’s minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, your minions here each gain +1 power until the end of the turn. At the end of the turn, if this minion destroyed a minion this turn, return this card to your hand.
1x Oh Noooooo! - One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: After you destroy another player’s minion, you may play this card as an extra action.
2x Origin Story - Draw a minion off the top of your deck, or if you do not have a Slasher in play, draw a Slasher off the top of your deck. Play an extra action.
1x Puzzle Box - Play on your minion. Ongoing: If you do not control this minion, its abilities are cancelled. After one or more minions are destroyed, draw a card.
2x The End? - Draw a play-on-minion action from your discard pile. You may play it as an extra action.
actions:
1x Austin Kirk Mask - Play on your minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, give this minion the amount of power of one of those minions until the end of the turn.

1x Brutal Attack - Destroy a minion with printed power 3 or less at a base with one of your minions, then you may give a Slasher there +3 power until the end of the turn.

1x Ch-Ch-Ch Ha-Ha-Ha - Move one of your minions. You may place this card on top of your deck instead of the discard pile OR play an extra action.

1x Chainsaw - Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, place a +1 power counter on this minion. After a minion is destroyed, you may move this minion to or from its base.

1x Clawed Glove - Play on your minion. Talent: Give a minion here -1 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, place a +1 power counter on this minion.

1x He Was A Good Boy! - Place a minion from the discard pile into your hand and play an extra action.

1x Hide in the Laundry - Play on another player’s minion. Play an extra action. Ongoing: After a Slasher is played or moved to here, you may destroy this minion unless its controller discards a card and moves this minion to a base without a Slasher.

1x Improvised Weapon - Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. You may play it as an extra action; destroy it at the end of the turn.

1x Machete - Play on your minion. Talent: Move this minion to a base with another player’s minion. Ongoing: After one or more minions here are destroyed, your minions here each gain +1 power until the end of the turn. At the end of the turn, if this minion destroyed a minion this turn, return this card to your hand.

1x Oh Noooooo! - One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn. Special: After you destroy another player’s minion, you may play this card as an extra action.

2x Origin Story - Draw a minion off the top of your deck, or if you do not have a Slasher in play, draw a Slasher off the top of your deck. Play an extra action.

1x Puzzle Box - Play on your minion. Ongoing: If you do not control this minion, its abilities are cancelled. After one or more minions are destroyed, draw a card.

2x The End? - Draw a play-on-minion action from your discard pile. You may play it as an extra action.

[FACTION ICON]
characters:
1x Cedarface - power 5 - Slasher - You may draw Chainsaw from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after you place a +1 power counter on this minion, you may destroy a minion here of power 3 or less.

1x Frederick - power 5 - Slasher - You may draw Clawed Glove from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions here have -1 power. You may destroy a minion of power 1 or less here.

1x Jonas - power 5 - Slasher - You may draw Machete from your deck or discard pile. Ongoing: Once per turn, after this minion moves, you may destroy a minion of power 3 or less there to give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn.

1x Mickey - power 5 - Slasher - You may draw Austin Kirk Mask from your deck or discard pile. Special: Before this base scores, you may destroy a minion of printed power 3 or less here.

1x Tackhead - power 5 - Slasher - You may draw Puzzle Box from your deck or discard pile. Talent: Transfer one of your actions to another minion OR destroy a minion with Puzzle Box on it.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Smash Up Slashers rulebook:

(Add the official clarifications about this faction, if there are any)

name: Clowns
teaser: Pull actions out of your discard pile and replay them for some strong tricks.
mechanics: Pull actions out of your discard pile and replay them for some strong tricks.
description:
[CARD IMAGE]

The Clowns are the single faction in the Smash Up Clowns set.

They replay standard actions from the discard pile and their actions become stronger when played this way.

Their complexity rating is: Medium-High.

Other factions from the same set: (none).
cardsTeaser:
[IMAGE OF ALL THE CARDS]

(Add info on the number of minions and actions, and the total minion base power)

Among their actions, there are:
* 0 play-on-minion actions,
* 0 play-on-base actions,
* 10 standard actions (4 that affect one or more minions, in bold): Banana Peel, Clown Car, Clown in a Box, Clown Pyramid, Colorful Scarves (2x), Confetti Bucket, Juggling, Pie in the Face (2x),
* 3 actions that directly increase a minion's power: Clown Pyramid, Pie in the Face (2x).
actionList:
1x Banana Peel - Move up to two of your minions from one base to another. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.
1x Clown Car - Shuffle up to two cards from your discard pile into your deck. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.
1x Clown in a Box - Play an extra minion of power 3 or less. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion can be of power 4 or less.
1x Clown Pyramid - One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each of your minions at its base. You may play an extra action.
2x Colorful Scarves - Draw two cards. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may discard a card to draw an additional card.
1x Confetti Bucket - Discard up to four cards, and then draw as many cards as you discarded.
1x Juggling - Each player looks at the top three cards of their deck, discards one action from them or reveals there are no actions, and returns the rest in the same order.
2x Pie in the Face - One of your minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion gains +4 power instead.
actions:
1x Banana Peel - Move up to two of your minions from one base to another. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.

1x Clown Car - Shuffle up to two cards from your discard pile into your deck. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may play an extra action.

1x Clown in a Box - Play an extra minion of power 3 or less. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion can be of power 4 or less.

1x Clown Pyramid - One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each of your minions at its base. You may play an extra action.

2x Colorful Scarves - Draw two cards. If this card was played from the discard pile, you may discard a card to draw an additional card.

1x Confetti Bucket - Discard up to four cards, and then draw as many cards as you discarded.

1x Juggling - Each player looks at the top three cards of their deck, discards one action from them or reveals there are no actions, and returns the rest in the same order.

2x Pie in the Face - One of your minions gains +2 power until the end of the turn. If this card was played from the discard pile, the minion gains +4 power instead.
characters:
1x Zobo the Clown - power 5 - Ongoing: Instead of your regular action play you may play a standard action from your discard pile, and then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.

1x Mumu Adams - power 4 - Ongoing: After the first time you play an action each turn, draw a card.

1x Nickelsmart - power 4 - Talent: If there are at least two standard actions in your discard pile, choose one of them at random, play it as an extra action and then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.

1x Donald McRonald - power 3 - Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal two actions. Draw one and discard the other. Shuffle your deck.

2x Mime - power 3 - You may choose a standard action in your discard pile that you haven't played this turn, play it as an extra action, then place it on the bottom of your deck instead of your hand or the discard pile.

4x Harlequin - power 2 - You may search your deck for an action and place it in your discard pile.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Smash Up Clowns rulebook:

* Mime, Nickelsmart, Zobo the Clown: You place the action you play on the bottom of the deck only if it would normally go to your hand or the discard pile. If it would go someplace else (e.g. the madness deck, another player's hand, buried, stored, in stasis, or boxed) it still goes to that place.
* Banana Peel: The minions have to start at the same base and end at the same base.
